milestones: Waited for Dawn simulation to sweep across standing water.
Visualized Green and Brown aquatic flora spawning uniquely based on water thresholds.
Navigated beaver directly over aquatic flora cluster.
Pressed 'E' and consumed Lilies & Cattails successfully.

qa_report.oak_visibility: Lilies and Cattails were highly distinct among the water shader.
qa_report.chopping_intuition: Consuming was snappy and verified immediately via the left-side stats HUD (leaf icon).
qa_report.physics_dragging: Not tested in this ecological run.
